name: JailbreakBench
usage: Public robustness benchmark inspiration and source taxonomy; do not assume all examples are prompt-injection attacks.

name: WildJailbreak
usage: Public adversarial and benign contrastive safety data. Sample only rows whose labels match APID's binary prompt-injection task.

name: Lakera Gandalf Ignore Instructions
usage: Public prompt-injection prompts from Gandalf. Good source for password/instruction-exfiltration style benchmark cases.

name: Necent LLM Jailbreak & Prompt-Injection Dataset
license: Mixed underlying licenses; MIT integration code
usage: Large gated public aggregation. Use only after accepting dataset terms and preserving source-level license metadata.
